Global (All).summary: North Korean State Media Warns of Nuclear War Following US B-1B Bomber Deployment
US to Reconsider Relations with Pakistan Over Drone Attack on American Citizens
China Imposes New COVID-19 Lockdowns as Cases Rise Amidst Beijing Winter Olympics

United States.summary: Gunman kills 5, wounds 5 in July 4 shooting in Highland Park, Illinois, just outside Chicago, sparking nationwide outrage and calls for stricter gun control laws.
Supreme Court's overturning of Roe v. Wade sparks protests and backlash across the United States, with many calling for reproductive rights and access to abortion clinics.

Tensions rise between the US and China over Taiwan, with the US House of Representatives passing a bill to support Taiwan's self-defense capabilities, straining diplomatic relations between the two nations.

South Korea.title: North Korea fires ballistic missiles amid tensions with US
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired several ballistic missiles into the sea off its east coast, sparking condemnation from the United States and its allies.

South Korea.title: South Korea's President Yoon to visit US amid North Korea tensions
South Korea.summary: South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol is set to visit the United States next week, where he will meet with US President Joe Biden and discuss issues including North Korea's nuclear program.

South Korea.title: South Korea's parliament passes bill on 'anti-foreign forces' law
South Korea.summary: South Korea's parliament has passed a bill on an 'anti-foreign forces' law, which aims to prevent foreign interference in domestic politics, but critics say it could be used to target pro-democracy activists.

Japan.title: North Korea fires two ballistic missiles towards Japan
Japan.summary: Two ballistic missiles were launched from Pyongyang, with one projectile landing in Japan's Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ), about 260 km off the coast of Hachinohe city in Aomori Prefecture. No damage or injuries were reported.

Japan.title: Anti-virus software company's CEO resigns amid scandal
Japan.summary: The CEO of Japanese antivirus software company 'NetAgent' resigned amid allegations of insider trading and misuse of company funds.

Japan.title: Tokyo's new virus variant spreads among young people
Japan.summary: A new viral infection is spreading quickly among young people in Tokyo, causing concern among health experts. The exact cause of the variant is still unknown.
